body.u: I am 15 years of age, hoping to leave school to become a hairdresser or hope to be, and soon to run my own buisnessbusiness, and when I have raised quite a bit of money I shall imegrateemmigrate and start a buisnessbusiness over in the unitedUnitedstatesStates of americaAmerica and shall have plans for getting marridmarried. I shall have two kids and live over in the USA in a very big house. I shall like to travel round the world to meet different kinds of people.
When I get back to the USA I hope to acheviedachieve quite a bit of money just enough to retire on.
When I do retire I shall have a big car to travel in but in the meantime my kids shall be better educated by going to a school and hope they to shall get a good job.

I would like to live back in englandEngland and see my parents that is if they are still alive I shall keep my business runingrunnign even when I die. I want to retire in the country with plenty of money. Hope to get a telegram from the Queen.
